newsSince: No new material company-specific news since June 9. The June 3 announcement of a 23rd consecutive annual dividend hike (+~10%) and a 500k-share buyback, alongside record Q3 FY26 results (net income +25%, sales +9%; call June 9), is real but entirely cat-litter/consumer-driven, with zero AI-facility sorbents evidence. This catalyst was already adjudicated in the June 9 case.

verdicts.rankRationale: The June 8 record Q3 (cat-litter +13%, dividend hike, buyback) is real fundamental strength but entirely consumer-driven, adding zero evidence for the latent AI-facility sorbents pathway this strict screen requires. At +100% YTD on a non-AI catalyst, the name is no longer hidden or under-owned; residual alpha on this lens keeps compressing. Continue down.
verdicts.bull: Record results, rising dividend and buyback; engineered minerals have filtration/humidity-control optionality.
verdicts.neutral: Excellent consumer-staples execution, but the AI angle is speculative.
verdicts.bear: All growth is cat-litter/consumer; no AI-facility demand, and +100% YTD removes the 'hidden' premise.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Thesis is non-AI; valuation rerated on consumer earnings
